message:
debug: Capture and display actual build errors in Linux CI

- Use --verbose to get detailed output
- Tee to build.log for analysis
- Grep for error messages and show first 100 lines
- Will reveal what the 40 compilation errors are

files.patch:
@@ -90,7 +90,7 @@ jobs:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Build
-        run: zig build -freference-trace=20 -fno-error-limit 2>&1 | head -200 || true
+        run: zig build --verbose 2>&1 | tee build.log; cat build.log | grep -A5 "error:" | head -100 || echo "Build completed"
 
       - name: Run Linux-specific CPython tests
         id: test-linux
